1.1.1: We operate primarily in Vietnam, with portfolio companies across Southeast Asia including Thailand, Indonesia, and the Philippines. Emerging market operations represent 80% of our portfolio.
1.1.2: Our operations span office-based services (HQ in HCMC), light manufacturing facilities in Binh Duong, and logistics hubs in Hai Phong.
1.1.3: Key suppliers operate in Vietnam, China, South Korea, and Japan.
1.1.4: 450 permanent FTEs, 120 part-time staff, and approximately 200 contractors on rolling engagements.
1.1.5: Material ESG risks: climate transition risks, labour standards in supply chain, data privacy compliance. Opportunities: green financing, circular economy initiatives.
1.2.1: 2 - Partly developed at departmental level. Central ESG coordination is planned for 2026.
1.2.2: Yes, Head of Sustainability (reports to CEO) handles day-to-day ESG matters.
1.3.1: Yes. CEO-signed environmental policy covering climate change, waste, energy, water. Last reviewed Q4 2025.
1.3.2: Policy reviewed annually; last update October 2025.
2.1.1: Yes, standalone ESG policy published 2024. Covers all material ESG topics with measurable KPIs.
2.1.2: Key commitments: net-zero by 2040, 100% renewable electricity by 2030, zero-waste-to-landfill by 2028, SA8000 compliance across supply chain.
